message:
[review-fix] Match pandas infinite float divmod

Fix fp-columnar float modulo and floor-division for signed zero and infinite operands. The previous infinity modulo fix returned the wrong zero sign for 0 % -inf / -0 % +inf and allowed inf % inf to produce infinity instead of NaN; floor division also used plain (a / b).floor(), which misses pandas' -1 results for finite values divided by opposite-signed infinity.

Validation: cargo fmt --check -p fp-columnar; rch exec -- cargo test -p fp-columnar; rch exec -- cargo clippy -p fp-columnar --all-targets -- -D warnings; ubs crates/fp-columnar/src/lib.rs.
